title: Taxonomy of Alternative Security Approaches
description: A visual breakdown of non-traditional security methodologies, showing how they relate and complement each other.
elements: Zero Trust Architecture (e.g., Never Trust, Always Verify)
relationships: Proactive and Deception strategies aim to confuse attackers. Moving Target and Resilience focus on adaptability and survivability. Zero Trust and UEBA are identity-centric. AI/ML and Hardware provide enabling foundations for other approaches. Blockchain offers decentralized integrity.
